summary: Tested new logo upload feature in Settings page, Report Modal wider layout (max-w-5xl), and X close button styling/positioning. All features working correctly.

issues: Recharts width/height -1 warnings on initial dashboard load (known issue from previous iterations)

passed_tests: Login with demo@aslanbasoto.com / demo123 works correctly
Login response includes logo_url field
GET /api/auth/me returns logo_url
PUT /api/auth/profile can update logo_url
POST /api/upload requires authentication (returns 401 without token)
POST /api/upload accepts PNG images
POST /api/upload rejects non-image files (returns 400)
Full logo flow: upload -> save to profile -> verify in login response
Settings page loads with 'Şirket Logosu' section visible
Settings page shows 'Logoyu Değiştir' button when logo exists
Logo file input accepts: image/png,image/jpeg,image/webp,image/gif
Logo preview displays when logo is uploaded
Report Modal is wider (1024px width = max-w-5xl)
Report Modal is perfectly centered (960px center on 1920px viewport)
Report Modal X button does NOT overlap PDF/Yazdır buttons
Report Modal DialogHeader has pr-10 padding
PromoCard Modal is centered (960px center)
PromoCard Modal X button does NOT overlap PDF İndir button
PromoCard Modal DialogHeader has pr-10 padding
X close button has bg-muted/80 rounded-full p-1.5 styling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Logo upload feature verified: Settings page has 'Şirket Logosu' section with upload button, file input accepts PNG/JPG/WEBP/GIF, logo_url is stored in user profile and returned in login response. Report Modal: wider max-w-5xl (1024px), centered, X button uses rounded-full bg-muted/80 styling, pr-10 on header prevents button overlap. PromoCard Modal: same X button styling and pr-10 header padding. All modals properly centered at viewport center.

dialog_x_button_styling.classes: absolute right-4 top-4 z-10 rounded-full p-1.5 bg-muted/80

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code shown on screen
